ns0:entry.ns0:title: GitoxideLabs/gitoxide
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/GitoxideLabs/gitoxide
Language: rust
An idiomatic, lean, fast & safe pure Rust implementation of Git

ns0:entry.ns0:title: SaladDay/cc-switch-cli
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/SaladDay/cc-switch-cli
Language: rust
⭐️ A cross-platform CLI All-in-One assistant tool for Claude Code, Codex & Gemini CLI.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: aaif-goose/goose
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/aaif-goose/goose
Language: rust
an open source, extensible AI agent that goes beyond code suggestions - install, execute, edit, and test with any LLM

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dandavison/delta
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dandavison/delta
Language: rust
A syntax-highlighting pager for git, diff, grep, rg --json, and blame output

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dmtrKovalenko/fff
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dmtrKovalenko/fff
Language: rust
The fastest and the most accurate file search toolkit for AI agents, Neovim, Rust, C, and NodeJS

ns0:entry.ns0:title: farion1231/cc-switch
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/farion1231/cc-switch
Language: rust
A cross-platform desktop All-in-One assistant tool for Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, openclaw & Gemini CLI.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ilysenko/codex-desktop-linux
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ilysenko/codex-desktop-linux
Language: rust
Run OpenAI Codex Desktop on Linux - automated installer

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mayocream/koharu
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mayocream/koharu
Language: rust
ML-powered manga translator, written in Rust.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: memvid/memvid
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/memvid/memvid
Language: rust
Memory layer for AI Agents. Replace complex RAG pipelines with a serverless, single-file memory layer. Give your agents instant retrieval and long-term memory.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: openai/codex
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/openai/codex
Language: rust
Lightweight coding agent that runs in your terminal

ns0:entry.ns0:title: rtk-ai/rtk
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/rtk-ai/rtk
Language: rust
CLI proxy that reduces LLM token consumption by 60-90% on common dev commands. Single Rust binary, zero dependencies

ns0:entry.ns0:title: rustdesk/rustdesk
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/rustdesk/rustdesk
Language: rust
An open-source remote desktop application designed for self-hosting, as an alternative to TeamViewer.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: rustfs/rustfs
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/rustfs/rustfs
Language: rust
🚀2.3x faster than MinIO for 4KB object payloads. RustFS is an open-source, S3-compatible high-performance object storage system supporting migration and coexistence with other S3-compatible platforms such as MinIO and Ceph.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: superradcompany/microsandbox
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/superradcompany/microsandbox
Language: rust
🧱 secure, local and programmable sandboxes for AI agents

ns0:entry.ns0:title: tailcallhq/forgecode
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/tailcallhq/forgecode
Language: rust
AI enabled pair programmer for Claude, GPT, O Series, Grok, Deepseek, Gemini and 300+ models

ns0:entry.ns0:title: tonhowtf/omniget
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/tonhowtf/omniget
Language: rust
Open source desktop app for studying online courses and books on your computer. Watch Hotmart, Udemy, Kiwify courses with timestamped notes, spaced repetition flashcards and a focus timer. Read PDFs and EPUBs with highlights, bookmarks and a focus mode. Also downloads YouTube, Instagram, TikTok and torrents.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: warpdotdev/warp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/warpdotdev/warp
Language: rust
Warp is an agentic development environment, born out of the terminal.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: zed-industries/zed
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/zed-industries/zed
Language: rust
Code at the speed of thought – Zed is a high-performance, multiplayer code editor from the creators of Atom and Tree-sitter.
